subcodes.title: Words to Abdu'l-Ghaffar, spoken on 1915-04-08
subcodes.first_line: You must clearly understand that the Blessed Perfection has commanded most emphatically that in case of sickness, one must refer to the skilled physician and abide by his prescription
subcodes.first_line_orig: این را بدانید جمال مبارک امر اکید برجوع بحکیم فر موده انسان باید جزئیاترا هم از حکیم سئوال نماید
subcodes.subjects: @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @stories; anecdotes, @praise of Western values; culture, @critique of Eastern values; culture
